ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time in seconds since the start of the data collection */,
  "p0_0" REAL /* Pressure at 0 cm depth */,
  "p0_100" REAL /* Pressure at 100 cm depth */,
  "p100_0" REAL /* Pressure at 100 cm height */,
  "p100_100" REAL /* Pressure at 200 cm height */,
  "uz0" REAL /* Vertical velocity at 0 cm depth */,
  "uz100" REAL /* Vertical velocity at 100 cm depth */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the data entry was last updated */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., pressure, temperature) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the location is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of the site (e.g., urban, rural, industrial) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the site */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name for the site */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being checked */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue found (e.g., outlier, missing data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who checked the data */,
  "date_checked" TEXT /* Date the data was checked */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the issue has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing" (
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing task */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being processed */,
  "processing_type" TEXT /* Type of processing (e.g., filtering, interpolation) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for processing */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the processing task (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Date the processing started */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date the processing completed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the processing task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the processing task was last updated */,
  "logs" TEXT /* Logs or messages generated during processing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data used in the simulation */,
  "simulation_type" TEXT /* Type of simulation (e.g., weather forecast, pollution dispersion) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the simulation */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Date the simulation started */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date the simulation completed */,
  "results_file" TEXT /* File path to the simulation results */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the simulation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the simulation was last updated */,
  "logs" TEXT /* Logs or messages generated during the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, operating system) used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum or hash of the file contents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was calibrated */,
  "calibration_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for calibration */,
  "calibrated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration */,
  "calibration_results" TEXT /* Results of the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_calibrated_by FOREIGN KEY ("calibrated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., cleaning, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_method" TEXT /* Method used for maintenance */,
  "maintenance_results" TEXT /* Results of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "versioned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_versioned_by FOREIGN KEY ("versioned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., trend analysis, anomaly detection) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Date the analysis started */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date the analysis completed */,
  "results_file" TEXT /* File path to the analysis results */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the analysis was last updated */,
  "logs" TEXT /* Logs or messages generated during the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analyses_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site owner */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site they are responsible for */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the site owner */,
  "owner_email" TEXT /* Email address of the site owner */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the site owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_owners_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)
